text: Five layers is over-engineered for a 7-component personal system; no evidence of current documentation failure justifying this
Nightly persona interviews will produce noise, not signal — system doesn't change enough between nights
Generator is wired around CLAUDE.md; introducing ARCHITECTURE.md without rewiring creates immediate drift
Hugin port disagreement (3032 vs 3035) proves authority problem, not layering problem
Diff-based digest is underspecified; LLM text variance makes naive diff noisy
Munin already acts as documentation layer; plan understates duplication risk
ADR-lite (docs/decisions/) might suffice instead of per-repo ARCHITECTURE.md
L5 operationally coupled to huginmunin host — should be explicitly documented
User perspectives layer preserved by assertion of novelty, not evidence of value
Folding vision into architecture.md increases blast radius of staleness
Structured interviews create new schema/governance problem without clear ownership
Need enforcement, not just placement — authority map must have teeth (generator inputs, lint, routing rules)
Generator already blurs live snapshot and curated architecture — needs sharper boundaries before adding layers
